content.en:
"I agree!"

Ye Tian said.

He is not afraid of great terror, in terms of life-saving ability, he is confident that he is above the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor, even the Golden Saint Dao Ancestor can escape, and he naturally has no problems.

Moreover, in terms of strength, he was sure to fight with the weaker half-step domain ancestors, where would he be afraid of the so-called great terror.

Next, these Dao Ancestors began to look for forbidden bloodline creatures in this large forbidden treasure land, there are many forbidden bloodline creatures here, capture some, plus the forbidden bloodline creatures suppressed before, it is enough to gather a large number of forbidden bloodline creatures.

Whoa!!!

An invincible Dao Ancestor and a handful of Supreme Dao Ancestors took action.

The other Dao Ancestors did not continue to stay here, but went to other places to find forbidden and strange things.

Anyway, they were not qualified to compete for this forbidden treasure, if they delayed time, the forbidden strange things in this large forbidden treasure land would be taken away by other Dao ancestors, so they naturally had to leave here and quickly search for the forbidden strange things.

Little by little, time passed.

Soon, an invincible Dao Ancestor came to this isolated island again, and Ye Tian also returned.

Everyone was very nervous, because if something happened, someone might fall.

"Let's get started!"

A Mighty Dao Ancestor, Invincible Dao Ancestor, threw the Forbidden Bloodline Creature at the Forbidden Arcana Black Wood.

Bang!!!!

The great terror was triggered, and the dense forbidden bloodline creatures seemed to be frozen, and the illusory claws slashed across their bodies, quickly killing them in an instant.

Then, one by one, the claws grabbed at the invincible Dao Ancestors and several supreme Dao Ancestors.

Since it was against many invincible Dao Ancestors at the same time, the power of each illusory claw must not be very strong.

It was impossible for the Dao Ancestors to sit still, and they all burst out with all their strength, trying to attack this illusory claw, and the power of the Dao Ancestors also slightly affected the power of the illusory claws, so that it would not have no effect at all.

But these illusory claws still penetrated the body of a famous Dao ancestor, and even Ye Tian did not avoid it, and was also attacked by illusory claws.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying power invaded Ye Tian's body, constantly destroying his body, even the forbidden body was very thin under this force, and the physical body was destroyed little by little, but it was offset by the restoration of the forbidden origin power in time.

Ye Tian was slightly injured!

However, the others were not easy, an invincible Dao Ancestor was not lightly injured, while three Supreme Dao Ancestors fell, and an invincible Dao Ancestor with poor life-saving ability also fell.

Four people fell at once!

Then, the illusory roc attacked everyone again, and one illusory claw after another attacked.

This time, another person fell, and several invincible Dao Ancestors had already been severely injured, and they didn't dare to stay here any longer, so they fled in an instant.

"How can this be? Could it be that this great horror is endless?"

Many Invincible Dao Ancestors panicked.

If the Great Terror is not offset, they don't dare to take the Forbidden Treasure at all, otherwise whoever takes it will die.

But soon, the Invincible Dao Ancestors found that the power of the Great Terror had weakened a lot, much weaker than before.

In this way, an invincible Dao Ancestor stubbornly resisted the power of the Great Terror, constantly weakening the power of the Great Terror, making the power of the Great Terror weaker and weaker.

It didn't take long for the power of great terror to be able to threaten many Dao Ancestors.

Just when many invincible Dao Ancestors set their sights on that forbidden treasure and no longer paid attention to the great terror, something happened suddenly.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying force emanated from the forbidden treasure, forming a special domain field that enveloped the entire island.

This domain field contains a unique taboo rule, which seems to be some kind of spatial rule, blocking the island at once.

An invincible Dao Ancestor tried to use some kind of escape-type arcana treasure to escape, but it failed.

"Damn, I can't escape!"

The Invincible Dao Ancestor said in despair.

Anyone could see that something had happened, but no matter how they escaped, it was useless, even if they flew out, they couldn't fly out, and the void where the island was located seemed to be infinitely expanded.

This is like Sun Wukong can't escape from the palm of the Buddha, no matter how far he flies, it won't help.

In the field, a huge creature appeared, like an enlarged version of the Roc, somewhat similar to the Darkwing Roc Eagle that had fallen in the Dark Forbidden Realm before, but it was not actually the same species.

This roc is pitch black, has six claws, and has golden eyes.

At this time, this Dapeng seemed to have descended from its true body, and the terrifying forbidden creature aura permeated, making everyone's hearts tremble.

"How can this be, this is a forbidden creature!"

The Invincible Dao Ancestors said with fear in their hearts.

"It's a projection!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor smiled bitterly: "It's just that this forbidden creature is too powerful, even if it is separated by infinite distance, the projection power is comparable to that of a half-step domain ancestor. Moreover, it should be very proficient in the rules of space, so it can project a wisp of consciousness, and this should be the embodiment of a great horror projection containing a trace of consciousness!"

Everyone couldn't imagine what kind of powerful forbidden creature it was, so that a trace of projection could have the strength of a half-step domain ancestor.

"Let's go together, if we don't kill it, we'll all die!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor proposed.

Rumble!!!!

The Dapeng creatures are killed, and these Dao Ancestors can't be considered.

In an instant, the two sides fought.

In the face of the Dapeng projection creatures with the combat power of the half-step domain ancestors, many invincible Dao ancestors were not defeated at all, and they were hit hard one by one and flew out.

However, fortunately, it is a projection, and the defense is not strong, so many invincible Dao Ancestors have played their hole cards, which is enough to compete with the Dapeng projection creatures.

However, the difference in strength between the two sides was too large, and casualties soon followed.

In addition to Ye Tian, several other supreme Dao Ancestors died one by one, and the weaker Invincible Dao Ancestors also quickly fell and died.

Suddenly.

The Dapeng projection creature grabbed the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor who was already seriously injured with one claw, the void froze, and the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor was difficult to break free, and the forbidden defensive armor on his body had long been broken, and the life-saving things were almost used up.

He may not be able to block this blow.

Just as the claws were about to fall, a spear suddenly stopped the Dapeng projection creature, and a figure blocked in front of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor.

This person is Ye Tian!

"Thank you Wanfa Dao Ancestor!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor thanked.

Ye Tian didn't speak, but went straight to fight with this Dapeng projection creature.

At this moment, he doesn't need to hide his strength.

If you can fight with the half-step domain ancestor, it is already enough to rank at the level of the half-step domain ancestor, plus with the Black Wind Mountain as a backer, what else do you need to be afraid of?

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian and the Dapeng projection creatures continued to fight, and such combat power completely stunned everyone.

The Xeon Dao Ancestor competes with the Dapeng projection creatures at the half-step domain ancestor level, which is too exaggerated!
